english_text: This year I will exercise more
I want to learn something new
I will study Korean every day
I will spend more time with family
korean_text: 가족과 더 많은 시간을 보낼 거예요
romanization: gajokgwa deo maneun siganeul bonael geoyeyo

english_text: I will be kinder to others
What is your New Year's resolution
I will write a diary every day
I will learn a musical instrument
I will spend less on unnecessary things
I hope this year is better
I will take better care of my health
I will manage my time better
I will listen to others more
korean_text: 다른 사람의 말을 더 들을 거예요
romanization: dareun saramui mareul deo deureul geoyeyo

english_text: I want to achieve my dreams
I will take things one step at a time
I will focus on what matters
This will be a great year
